name: Altai Resources Inc.
summary: Altai Resources Inc. operates as a natural resource exploration and development company in Canada. The company explores for oil and gas, and gold properties. It holds a 100% interest in the Sorel-Trois Rivieres natural gas property comprising five oil and gas and reservoir licenses covering an area of 68,483 hectares located in St. Lawrence Lowlands, Quebec; and a 45% interest in the Cessford oil property covering an area of 240 acres located in the Cessford area of Central Alberta. The company was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
